summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LM Studio multi-model developer mode implementation. All core features are working correctly including mode selection, model assignments, and backend integration.

design_issues.issue: Advanced configuration settings not persisted when panel is closed and reopened

passed_tests: Backend accepts LM Studio mode with model mapping configuration
Backend accepts Hybrid mode with mixed council model sources
Backend accepts OpenRouter mode with API key override
LM Studio URLs persisted correctly in backend config
Backend accepts config with default model fallback logic
Advanced LLM Configuration panel opens correctly
LM Studio mode shows Council Model Assignments section
Found 4 LM Studio model assignment inputs for council models
Chairman model input available in LM Studio mode
Model assignment inputs accept text input correctly
Hybrid mode shows Hybrid Model Assignments section
LM Studio toggle buttons work in hybrid mode
LM Studio model name inputs appear when toggled in hybrid mode
Chairman LM Studio toggle and input work in hybrid mode
OpenRouter mode correctly hides Council Model Assignments section
All three modes (OpenRouter, LM Studio, Hybrid) are selectable
Advanced panel can be closed and reopened
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Settings persistence needs improvement - advanced configuration mode selection should be saved to localStorage and restored when panel is reopened
